description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unit tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job strategy to test on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with both gcc and clang compilers. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.11, install uv with pip, install dependencies with ./install, and run tests with ./test, adapting the test command based on the compiler and operating system.
